text.title: GitHub Actions — Matrix Builds Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Decision tree on coverage need + concurrency safety + budget.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: define-axes
step.action: List supported versions/OS per language with rationale.

step.name: trim-with-include-exclude
step.action: Apply include/exclude to remove unsupported / add edge-case combos.

step.name: tune-fail-fast-and-budget
step.action: Set fail-fast based on signal value; bound max-parallel.

step.name: name-artifacts-validate
step.action: Define per-combo artifact naming; run validator; commit.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
